remarks: *** Back on Market - The opportunity now is yours to take! *** Welcome to townhouse living in a prime Stamford location. Located in the desirable Newfield East community, this inviting 2-bedroom townhouse offers comfort, convenience, and easy low maintenance living. With its private entrance and assigned parking, the home combines the feel of a single-family residence with the convenience of condominium living. Inside, you'll find a bright and functional layout featuring spacious living areas, a dedicated dining space, one full bath and a half bath, and plenty of natural light throughout. The staircase is highlighted by cathedral ceilings and a skylight, creating an open and airy feel with an attractive architectural touch. A private outdoor deck provides the perfect space for morning coffee, outdoor dining, entertaining, or simply relaxing. Conveniently located just off Newfield Avenue in the Belltown area, the home is close to shopping, restaurants, houses of worship, downtown Stamford, Metro North, and major commuter routes, while still offering a peaceful residential setting. This is a wonderful opportunity to enjoy comfortable living in one of Stamford's most sought-after neighborhoods.
